meaning: n.罗马(意大利首都),[史]罗马(古意大利一城邦,后发展成为罗马帝国)
examples: He won a weekend for two in Rome.
Rome was sacked by the Goths in 410.
I love Rome, especially in the spring.
Here lies Rome's loveliest, yet off-the-beaten-track church, the simple, majestic Santa Sabina (Piazza Pietro d'Illiria 1).
